programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E701 - Sparkle's Big Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher sends Blaze away with one of his latest cheats, Blaze's little sister Sparkle comes to save the day and bring her brother back in time so they can race together to win the Teamwork Trophy!

programme.title: E112 - The Crew Does A Home Renovation / The Crew Builds A Lighthouse
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: E523 - The Noisy Night
programme.desc: Peppa's family is staying at Cousin Chloe's house. It's been a long day and everyone is sleepy. But baby Alexander keeps everyone awake with his crying!

programme.title: Rocky's Cat-Astrophe
programme.desc: Rocky bites off more than he can chew when he invites a kitten to stay at the Lookout overnight. As the irascible kitten who idolizes Rocky causes more trouble than expected.

programme.title: Rocky's Cat-Astrophe
programme.desc: Rocky bites off more than he can chew when he invites a kitten to stay at the Lookout overnight. As the irascible kitten who idolizes Rocky causes more trouble than expected.

programme.title: E105 - Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E108 - Piggy In The Middle
programme.desc: Peppa teaches George how to catch a ball, and later, they play Monkey in the Middle with Mummy Pig.

programme.title: E209 - The Crew Builds A Ferris Wheel / The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: E206 - Partly Claudia / Ranita's Magic Stripes
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: E118 - Clock And Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: E226 - The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: E101 - The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' Birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: E703 - The Super Skateboard
programme.desc: It's Grammy's birthday but Crusher doesn't have enough money for a special gift! So, Blaze and AJ help him do different jobs and earn the money for Grammy's present. But, they have to hurry so they can be back in time for Grammy's birthday party!

programme.title: Rocky's Cat-Astrophe
programme.desc: Rocky bites off more than he can chew when he invites a kitten to stay at the Lookout overnight. As the irascible kitten who idolizes Rocky causes more trouble than expected.

programme.title: E101 - The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' Birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: E850 - Windmills
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: E852 - The Sandcastle
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a day out at the seaside and build a very large sandcastle with all their friends.

programme.title: E103 - Best Friend
programme.desc: Peppa Pig's best friend, Suzy Sheep, comes over to visit.

programme.title: E415 - The Flying Lion
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are excited to play with their new friend Roarian, the Flying Lion! But when Roarian loses his magical sunstone, he turns into a statue! Now it's up to Blaze and AJ to find the sunstone and restore Roarian's powers!

programme.title: E223 - Pups Save A Snowboard Competition / Pups Save A Chicken Of The Sea
programme.desc: Jake and Everest are excited for the Snowboard Competition, until they see the course is buried under a blanket of snow. // When the PAW Patrol sets out to retrieve Cap'n Turbot's sunken diving bell, they meet a giant Sea Slug!

programme.title: E102 - Birthday Party / Tick Tock Mr. Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: E216 - Going With The Flow
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside.

programme.title: Rocky's Cat-Astrophe
programme.desc: Rocky bites off more than he can chew when he invites a kitten to stay at the Lookout overnight. As the irascible kitten who idolizes Rocky causes more trouble than expected.

programme.title: E108 - Piggy In The Middle
programme.desc: Peppa teaches George how to catch a ball, and later, they play Monkey in the Middle with Mummy Pig.

programme.title: Invasive Fungal Infections - The New Threat
programme.desc: Invasive fungal infections are increasingly leading to life-threatening diseases worldwide. And in agriculture, fungi pose a massive threat to harvests. And the available antidotes for humans and plants are increasingly losing their effectiveness.

programme.title: Experiencing And Understanding The Art World
From Fruit Bats To Humans - A Virus On The Move
programme.desc: An infection with Nipah virus can quickly turn deadly. It's carried by fruit bats able to travel long distances. This time around we look at how organisms spread through migration, and how climate change affects the process.

programme.title: Hope After Loss
programme.desc: Nothing prepares us for the devastating loss of a loved one. The grief is overwhelming. And it doesn't go away quickly. Some say it never will. But sometimes women successfully turn their grief into action. They do something meaningful that not only transforms their own lives, but possibly the lives of many others.

programme.title: Experiencing And Understanding The Art World
Hogie Goes to Tromso
programme.desc: Hogie and his friends travel to Tromso, Norway to see the Northern Lights along with their new friend Birki and his dad. When some problems occur with their sleigh and their plans change, they realise that even the most perfect plans have room for improvement.

programme.title: Mountain of Water
programme.desc: Four young adventurers travel to Marakele National Park in South Africa. They spot baby impalas and a pride of lions, and almost walk into a herd of White Rhino. While travelling on foot they come across a battle between Matabele ants and termites.

programme.title: From the Stars
programme.desc: The Nektons try to stop a fallen satellite's fuel from polluting a marine sanctuary. But someone else is also interested in the satellite.

programme.title: Family Life in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Meet a peasant family in their daily lives, back in the Middle Ages. Dove and Howler are very busy parents! Besides educating their little urchin kids, welcoming a new baby, dealing with daily home life, life for these peasant parents is eventful to say the least!

programme.title: Lava Lamp
programme.desc: You'll lava this one. We'll show you how to use a bottle and oil in this make that bubbles and boils.

programme.title: Gala Day
programme.desc: It is Gala day, and the theme is the Frozen Kingdom. The Ice Stars gather together for what promises to be a sensational performance. But as the skaters are getting ready, some shattering news breaks at the rink.

programme.title: The Word on Problem Solving
programme.desc: Say what?! This episode focuses on the importance of reading math problems very carefully in order to fully understand the problem at hand. Because if you don't answer the right question, how can the solution ever be right?

programme.title: Time to Be Amazing
programme.desc: It's the first time Harry and George will be competing since George broke his arm and was told he would never be able to do gym again. And Dove and Nyree are determined to prove they are ready to take on the world!

programme.title: Admirable Admiral
programme.desc: Eric learns that even if something is made from a material that is denser or heavier than water, it will float if it has the right shape. He makes a paper boat strong enough to carry toy cars without sinking.

programme.title: A Reflection on Refraction
programme.desc: Eric does a fun experiment to show how refraction plays tricks with our eyes. He learns that when we look at objects, we see the light reflected from them. Because light doesn't travel as well through water as it does through air, things in water look different to us.

programme.title: Lava Lamp
programme.desc: You'll lava this one. We'll show you how to use a bottle and oil in this make that bubbles and boils.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Day of the Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Ricky makes dragon feet trainers and a beastly collage inspired by Hannah Hoech and finds himself in a fairy tale after being trolled by his virtual assistant. Things get weirder when Gav shows up with three little pigs.

programme.title: Reckless Rescue
programme.desc: There is an emergency in the Russian Arctic - a family of polar bears got trapped on a large piece of ice, stranded in the middle of the Arctic Ocean. Only the MeteoHeroes can save them. Nubess and Thermo are on their way to help.

programme.title: Solar Path
programme.desc: A German town is facing a difficult situation because of missing solar panels. Without them, the bicycle path becomes dark and dangerous, the train - got stuck between stations, and the school and houses have no light or heat!

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Bird Kite
programme.desc: What makes a kite stay in the sky? We'll explain all with this playful paper poultry!

programme.title: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh and Kloe must pull out all the stops to impress a royal visitor. There is also another very special person making a return to the rink, and ice dancer Ella has just days to get herself ready for her first-ever solo performance.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Day
programme.desc: Marisa and Beth rush to rescue a Cavalier King Charles Spaniel with an eye injury. Karen makes a house call to check on Bill and Ben.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: E7 - Family Matters
programme.desc: Tess is sent into a community skeptical of the police to discreetly investigate a local Church's potential links to human trafficking following the disappearance of the star soloist of the church's choir. As the girl's whole family comes under suspicion, Sunny brings some much needed perspective to the pressure put on many first generation kids by immigrant parents, helping Tess track the girl down in an unexpected location and uncover the dark truth behind her disappearance. The case prompts Tess to revisit a traumatic event in her childhood with Lucas and show support ahead of his wedding day.

programme.title: E16 - Out Of Time
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: E16 - The Best We Can Do
programme.desc: Shunned on his return, Richard seeks redemption treating a delivery worker. Amy, TJ, Sonya and Jake juggle a tense legal case.

programme.title: E1 - Gut Instinct
programme.desc: The discovery of two missing U.S. Navy aviators adrift in the Coral Sea leads the team to expose a sinister terrorist plot.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: To strike back at the Asakura and Azai clans, Oda Nobunaga calls on Ashikaga Yoshiaki and Tokugawa Ieyasu (Matsushita Kouhei) for military support. Yet their response is slow, as they secretly hope for Nobunaga's downfall. Meanwhile, Koichiro and Tokichiro try to buy time to help Ichi escape, but her heart remains with Azai Nagamasa, and their plan fails. As Nobunaga advances into northern Omi, the armies of Asakura and Azai face him across the Anegawa River, and the moment of battle arrives.

programme.title: Patna Shuklla
programme.desc: Tanvi Shukla, a lawyer in Patna's lower court, who is living her childhood dream of becoming a lawyer. Release Year: 2024 Director: Vivek Budakoti Awards: 2024 Winner Popular Award- Most Popular ActreSS in a Web Series Drama- Raveena Tandon

programme.title: Total Siyapaa
programme.desc: Aman, a Pakistani man living in London, falls in love with Asha, an Indian woman. But he must convince her parents to let them get married, despite their different nationalities. Release Year: 2014 Director: Eeshwar Nivas Awards: 2005 Winner Special Award - Ramesh Sippy - Best film in the last 50 years of Indian cinema.

programme.title: Total Siyapaa
programme.desc: Aman, a Pakistani man living in London, falls in love with Asha, an Indian woman. But he must convince her parents to let them get married, despite their different nationalities. Release Year: 2014 Director: Eeshwar Nivas Awards: 2005 Winner Special Award - Ramesh Sippy - Best film in the last 50 years of Indian cinema.

programme.title: E155 - The Awareness/The Parents
programme.desc: Gumball tries to convince Leslie he's an expert on all things plant-related. However, when Leslie realises Gumball hasn't got a clue what he's talking about, he decides to call his bluff. An escalation of dangerous dares and stunts ensue as they try to out-plant each other.

programme.title: E26 - Muscle Woman/The End Of Muscle Man
programme.desc: Muscle Man breaks up with his girlfriend Starla leaving him an emotional mess and unable to work. Mordecai and Rigby try to get them back together.

programme.title: E37 - Shiro Becomes A Ninja/The Secret Of The Super Hero Badge/An Ant's Life/Sunday Golf
programme.desc: Shiro must sneak into a castle in Kasukabe Ninja Town where a secret book in the shape of a bone is hidden in, and it may be the Bobobobobone.

programme.title: E3 - Rigby's Body/Over The Top/Cool Bikes/Limousine Lunchtime/Saving Time
programme.desc: When Rigby eats too much junk food, his body forces out his consciousness. Rigby, Mordecai and Skips set out on a quest to get it back before sunset.

programme.title: E23 - B. Black Cat/Hunger Strikes/Gravi-Tom/Ghost Party/Cat-Astrophe
programme.desc: Fed up with Tom, Hildie and Beatie threaten to get a 'real' witch's cat: a black cat. In desperation, Tom takes a magic potion that makes him turn black but only temporarily.

programme.title: E442 - Walking Into Trouble/Bean's Baby
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets competitive on a hike when he sees some more experienced ramblers.

programme.title: E442 - Walking Into Trouble/Bean's Baby
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets competitive on a hike when he sees some more experienced ramblers.

programme.title: E99 - The Re-Run/The Stories/The Guy/The Boredom/The Choices
programme.desc: When we last saw Gumball, he was hitting rewind on Rob's Universal Remote, just in time to save himself from being trapped in The Void. The remote has now taken Gumball back to the beginning of that disastrous day. Armed with the knowledge of what this day has in store, he must try and stop Rob from destroying his life.

programme.title: Jack Taylor: The Guards
programme.desc: Jack is hired to search for a missing teenage daughter which he traces to a sleazy manager Ford's factory and illegal sex recordings. That turns out only the tip of the iceberg...

programme.title: Mommy Would Never Hurt You
programme.desc: Riley wants to rebuild her estranged relationship with her mother and little sister who is ill. But when Riley realizes her sister may not actually be as sick as she appears, Riley's mother stops at nothing to keep her daughters with her forever.

programme.title: Jack Taylor: The Pikemen
programme.desc: Jack helps an old family friend, meets an old girl friend, falls in with some vigilantes and garners an unwanted partner.

programme.title: Jack Taylor: The Magdalen Martyrs
programme.desc: Jack is hired by the daughter of a former inmate of the infamous Magdalen Laundries to find the identity of a former nun, known only as Lucifer, who was notorious for taking pleasure in torturing the girls.

programme.title: Jack Taylor: The Magdalen Martyrs
programme.desc: Jack is hired by the daughter of a former inmate of the infamous Magdalen Laundries to find the identity of a former nun, known only as Lucifer, who was notorious for taking pleasure in torturing the girls.

programme.title: Jack Taylor: The Guards
programme.desc: Jack is hired to search for a missing teenage daughter which he traces to a sleazy manager Ford's factory and illegal sex recordings. That turns out only the tip of the iceberg...

programme.title: Jack Taylor: The Pikemen
programme.desc: Jack helps an old family friend, meets an old girl friend, falls in with some vigilantes and garners an unwanted partner.

programme.title: E2 - Marjorie (Part B)
programme.desc: Marjorie's husband, Irv, has recently been diagnosed with Parkinson's Disease and has already taken two dangerous falls in the house where the EMTs could not get to him.

programme.title: E153
programme.desc: A woman who killed her husband is disowned by her children in court; a teacher who slept with her teenaged students apologises to the victims' families; and more.

programme.title: E154
programme.desc: An irate plaintiff storms out of her virtual hearing and is charged with contempt; a quadruple murderer sobs uncontrollably at sentencing; a judge breaks down laughing at a defendant's complaints.

programme.desc: On his last day as an undercover agent, Bergen County Detective Carlos James experiences his first shootout, and ATF Agent Jenn Eskew poses as a hitwoman to investigate a possible murder for hire.

programme.desc: On his last day as an undercover agent, Bergen County Detective Carlos James experiences his first shootout, and ATF Agent Jenn Eskew poses as a hitwoman to investigate a possible murder for hire.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E5 - Small Wonders of Earth Week
programme.desc: Blippi explores the small wonders of Earth Week! He shrinks down to meet a friendly ant colony on a mission to find food. Then, he learns why flies love garbage trucks & meets a singing worm in the mud! The tiny adventures continue as Blippi discovers how spiders make webs, helps a blue jay rebuild its nest & flies inside a beehive to see how honey is made!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E2 - Little Problems, Big Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are turning little problems into big adventures! When Mr. Vanderboos accidentally sprays hair growth serum on Daddy, Officer Freeze mistakes him for a hairy monster, & a wild chase begins! Then, Mila has a bad cold, but she still has to help Morphle figure out the right morphs to rescue a dog stuck in a tree. From playing a quiet game to avoid waking a napping neighbor to playing hide & seek with friends, every little problem is a big adventure!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission
programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Discovery & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Join JJ & Cody as Earth Week nature explorers! Cody’s family goes on an autumn hike, playing in the leaves & making owl murals. Then, JJ & Cody turn a stream into a racetrack for walnut sailboats! The exploration continues as JJ captivates a butterfly, discovers tadpoles in the pond & becomes a junior scout on a camping trip. Plus, help the family rush to get the recycling out in time!

programme.title: E1 - Rainy Day Earth Week Fun
programme.desc: It's rainy day Earth Week fun with Little Baby Bum! Mia & Max help a spider climb the water spout & then splash in puddles when the rain stops! Then, they watch a caterpillar transform into a beautiful butterfly. The nature adventures continue as they listen to nocturnal animal sounds, build a bird bath & help ants collect crumbs for a picnic!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Discovery & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: In postwar Japan, a new terror rises; Godzilla. Will the devastated people be able to survive... let alone fight back?

programme.title: E13 - The Second Day
programme.desc: The second match of Karasuno High School is against Inarizaki High School, the runner-up of the Inter-High Tournament.

programme.title: E5 - When Seeking The Truth, Things Turned Into An Argument, So I Can No Longer
programme.desc: Prince Gerald makes an unexpected visit and Jill and Hadis have to act close to prove she was not kidnapped.

programme.title: E8 - The Notorious Beautiul Sisters
programme.desc: Amid a bustling yet enjoyable period, Makoto returns to work with Shiki. At Rotsgard Academy, Shifu and Yuno Rembrandt resume classes and attend a lecture with new transfer student Karen.

programme.title: E9 - The Villainess And The Dramatic Chin Lift
programme.desc: After rejecting Duke, she consider what he means to her, then acts to become her version of the ideal villainess.

E8 - The Pirate Inspector
programme.desc: A mysterious Pirate Inspector is coming to visit Captain Captain and the pirates. If they fail the inspection, they will get a huge fine. But they soon suspect the Inspector is someone they know!

programme.title: E10 - Rug Island
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: E11 - Charades
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: E12 - Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: E7 - The Sibling Badge
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: E8 - The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E2 - Hey Quacky!
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: E4 - What's Hot?
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E7 - Safari Party
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing on safari.

programme.title: E18 - It's Time To Put On A Show
programme.desc: JoJo doesn't know what to do with her odd socks, so Gran Gran suggests they put on a puppet show! The two of them turn the socks into puppets, ready for a show in the garden.

programme.title: E31 - Woolly Memories
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E32 - Beach Break
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are spending a day at the beach, aiming to build some sand animals.

programme.title: E6 - Gordon Gets The Giggles
programme.desc: Gordon becomes very worried when he gets a serious case of the giggles. He must find a way to control his laughter before it does any damage.

programme.title: E24 - Wagon Ride
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.desc: Supertato runs in fright when Pumpkin tries to make friends with him, but later realises she needs his help as she's stuck in the air hanging from balloons set up by Evil Pea.

programme.desc: The Squirrels meet Duggee's old dance crew and learn that he was kicked out because he couldn't stick to the choreography. The Squirrels are surprised because Duggee is such a good dancer!

programme.desc: The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.

programme.title: E24 - Bee Story

programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

E16
programme.desc: Romantic comedy about uniformed elite cadets chasing after their dreams.

programme.title: E751
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: A company's flagship idol is seemingly abandoned(?) by their own agency! Stepping away from life as a popular idol, the new journey begins.

programme.title: E36 - Snow Dance
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: E13 - Wildlife In Danger
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Generation F S1
programme.desc: Fashion, food, sport, urban culture, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the French touch. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets a new generation of creators and puts the spotlight on a bold and uninhibited French-speaking world.

programme.title: E8 - Car, Fridge, Can: Where Does Our Steel Come From?
programme.desc: How is French steel made? Hugo Clement investigates the heart of the heavy industry and reveals its little secrets. An opportunity to discover that a quarter of the greenhouse gas emissions from the French industry is linked to steel production and that this metal is recycled abroad.

programme.title: E5 - Special Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Direction for to visit Rodin's home and studio. Ceramic artist Gregoire Scalabre sculpts and accumulates to enter another dimension, between tiny and gigantic. The John Galliano show for Maison Margiela: a journey through time and the strange. Artist Amandine Antunes masters the stucco marble technique.

programme.title: E22 - Quebec, A Journey To Share
programme.desc: Accompanied by photographer and director Alexis Lopez, Ismael Khelifa explores western Quebec and its forests, which take on vibrant colors during the Indian summer. programme.title: E11 - Gers, From Village To Village
programme.desc: A picture postcard of the Gascony countryside, the Gers, with its vineyards and verdant landscapes, is a ''big garden'', rich in agriculture and livestock. The birthplace of d'Artagnan and Armagnac, Gascon traditions and cuisine live on in this land of history and culture.

programme.title: E4 - So Ugly
programme.desc: Christian welcomes actor Marc-Andre Grondin, writer Chrystine Brouillet, and chef Jean-Michel Leblond to cook foods considered 'unappetizing.' From offal to snails, they explore unusual flavors.

programme.title: E12 - Julien Fournie
programme.desc: He's rewriting the rules for haute couture: Julien Fournie's autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection is called ''Premier bouclier'', a hymn to powerful femininity, offering a new take on military clothing.

programme.title: E3 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Classical Painting
programme.desc: The Philadelphia Museum of Art is home to a major collection of American and European works, from the Italian Renaissance to the world of contemporary art. Amongst the French painters, those of the classical period: Vigee Le Brun, Corot, Delacroix, Millet, Couture, Courbet, Puvis de Chavannes...

programme.title: E35 - Grillemont - Le Clos Luce
programme.desc: The Grillemont castle, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. The Clos Luce, also near Tours, is famous for having been the home of the renowned Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: E3 - Mouscron
programme.desc: Wallonie picarde stop! Mouscron borders both France and the linguistic frontier: Aalbeke and Rekkem separate it from the Flemish region. Visits to the Marcel Marlier Centre, the creator of ''Martine'', the Castle of the Counts, the nature reserve, and the Blue Fountain.

programme.title: E423
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Delving deeper into the matchmaker's tried and tested techniques, more singles are encouraged to go on second dates and look beyond superficiality.

programme.title: E8 - Cartel Paradise - Fiji
programme.desc: Fiji is ground zero in the Pacific's drug crisis. Huge quantities of methamphetamine and cocaine are being trafficked through Fiji and on to Australia, fuelling a wave of addiction and corruption in the Fijian community.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

E1 - Super Sight
programme.desc: Vision – it’s how ninety-five percent of animals interpret the world. Every species on Earth is a chapter in the fascinating story of sight. This episode follows that story from blurry beginnigs to mind-blowing hexnocular vision.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E4 - The Queen is Back
programme.desc: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods, and power outages. Try to pin down the elusive Badalo before his data-gathering tag drops off and meet a new female the team is eager to study.

programme.title: E5 - Badalo is Missing
programme.desc: Watch the Onçafari team get to know Aroeira, their newly collared female, and take a peek at Aurora’s cub, Apolo. Continue to track Badalo, who has moved deeper into the flooded forest, where he puts Lizzie’s game-changing research in jeopardy.

programme.title: E4 - The Queen is Back
programme.desc: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods, and power outages. Try to pin down the elusive Badalo before his data-gathering tag drops off and meet a new female the team is eager to study.

programme.title: E5 - Badalo is Missing
programme.desc: Watch the Onçafari team get to know Aroeira, their newly collared female, and take a peek at Aurora’s cub, Apolo. Continue to track Badalo, who has moved deeper into the flooded forest, where he puts Lizzie’s game-changing research in jeopardy.

programme.title: E2 - Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: The Nsefu lion pride welcomes seven new cubs during the wet season, when antelope and buffalo are spread far from the river, making them harder to hunt. Learn how the mother lionesses work to keep the boisterous cubs alive.

programme.title: E5 - Hot Springs Pack
programme.desc: Meet a close-knit family of wild dogs who work together to raise pups and hunt enough food to feed the whole pack. While their well-coordinated hunts are successful, the wet season brings challenges when some of the team strikes out on their own.

programme.title: E6 - Heir to the Clan
programme.desc: Spotty, a female hyena cub, is destined to be leader of the Chimbwe clan that lives in the heart of Zambia’s Luangwa Valley. But she has yet to prove herself. Witness her fight to find her place in this savagely competitive family.

programme.title: E3 - Orangutan
programme.desc: Investigate the art of nest making with the jungle’s master builder: the orangutan. Shadow Max as he tries to escape the insect-filled floor of the Borneo rainforest and takes inspiration from this solitary primate’s natural engineering prowess.

programme.title: E4 - Chimpanzee
programme.desc: Track chimpanzees through the Rwandan forest with Max, who tries to convince these powerful monkeys that he’s a friend, not a foe. Pick up some key tips on jungle dining and witness complex family dynamics, including grooming and socializing.

programme.title: E1 - Arid Heart
programme.desc: From the vast, dry plains of the interior come some of Australia’s most recognized imagery, such as the monolithic red rock of Uluru and the bounding red kangaroo. But how did the arid center of the continent come to be?

programme.title: E3 - Behind the Lens
programme.desc: Track scientists who have arrived in the Kalahari to test a hypothesis: that animal collaboration is the key to the dizzying diversity of the region’s species. Observe as they monitor behavior, decipher data, and deliver fascinating conclusions.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Sports - PGA Tour
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest PGA TOUR tournament.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Lover Of The Last Empress
programme.desc: The last empress of China, CHI HEI, had dominated the country for over fifty years. Yet, her rise to power owned much to her manipulation of her beauty and sexual appeal. Prior to becoming one of the three thousand concubines chosen to serve the emperor. CHI met KUNG, younger brother of the Emperor; and they fell in love with each other. However, KUNG fled from the relationship to avoid conflicts with his brother. In order to stand out from other concubines, CHI racked her brains to design numerous creative and exciting “on-bed tricks” for the Emperor, who madly enjoyed their lovemaking. After she bore him a son, she became the first lady...

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it. The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.desc: After losing both her parents and battling an eating disorder, Paige turns to an adventure with Bear Grylls to regain her confidence in life. On this emotional journey, she reconnects with herself and the memories of her outdoor-loving dad.

programme.title: E10 - 甜妹唱戲腔反差拉滿
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E2 - 各國強推的神奇網站
programme.desc: 一檔外國人用中文搞事情的文化訪談類節目，由4名主席團成員大左、楊迪、陳銘及陳超，1名飛行嘉賓與10名不同國家的青年代表聚集在一起，以詼諧態度和調侃精神，增進中國與世界文化的交流，圍繞社會話題及各國風俗文化進行討論。
